question: will there be a Substack TV app for Fire TV?
textDescription:
On January 22, 2026, Substack launched the Substack TV app. So far, it only supports two platforms, namely Apple TV and Google TV.

Resolves:

YES if there is an official Substack TV app (i.e. developed by Substack itself) for Fire TV on the Amazon App Store (or any other app store for Fire TV, should one exist) released on or before May 31, 2026.

N/A if there is no Amazon App Store (or other suitable app store)

NO otherwise.
newsShortReason: No official Substack TV app for Fire TV has been announced or released as of May 27, 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: Substack launched TV apps for Apple TV and Google TV on January 22, 2026, but no mention of Fire TV support. | No official announcements or news reports indicate plans for a Fire TV app. | The Substack TV app is currently in beta for Apple TV and Google TV. | Substack has not provided updates regarding a Fire TV app since the initial launch. | No information suggests that Substack is developing a Fire TV app. | The absence of a Fire TV app may be due to technical challenges or strategic decisions.
